title: gal DecisionRequest
description: Runtime decide() request: a PEP asks the PDP whether an agent may exercise a capability at a scope. Vocabulary deliberately matches the gal/v1 CapabilityManifest (agent->identity, capability='verb:noun', scope). Adopts the governance charter contract; supersedes the leaner implemented EnforcementCheckRequest{action,repo,context}.

agent.description: Identity name from the manifest `identities` (the agent/NHI acting). The PDP resolves it to a declared agent identity; an unknown or human-tier id is denied (no tier-mixing).

capability.description: verb:noun, matching the manifest vocabulary. Verb prefix MUST be one of the 7 allow-listed verbs (read/post/propose/write/git/message/send) -- this regex fixes the stale 5-verb schema. Sub-rules (send-allowlist, message-target, email-channel draft-only bright line) are validator-enforced, not schema-expressible.

scope.description: Concrete target (repo, channel, resource). A bare wildcard ('', '*', 'all', 'any') is denied.

action.description: Optional concrete operation instance being attempted (refines capability).

context.description: Free-form decision context (repo, args, env, request_id, ...). Additive; the PDP ignores unknown keys.
